# HRTF datasets

Spatial audio (Phase 7) convolves source audio against head-related transfer
functions. Veyra ships the **MIT KEMAR** dataset, which is in the public
domain.

- `mit_kemar/` — MIT KEMAR compact HRTF impulse responses (public domain).
  Populated in Phase 7; empty in Phase 0.

Dataset: <https://sound.media.mit.edu/resources/KEMAR.html>
